name: Meera — Product Manager at a health insurer

goals: keep actuarial, underwriting and compliance aligned
answer 'is this feasible' without waiting two weeks for IT
frustrations: every change touches rating rules she cannot see
compliance blocks any tool that sends data outside
business and IT speak different languages
profile.behaviour: Cautious explorer. Reads the fine print. Immediately asks where data is stored and whether outputs cite real sources.
profile.technicalAbility: low-medium — Excel power user, no code
profile.riskTolerance: very low — regulated industry, mispriced product is a board-level incident
profile.preferredWorkflow: documents with sign-off states, evidence-backed answers, nothing leaves the building
profile.budgetSensitivity: medium — has a small tools budget if compliance approves
profile.decisionStyle: needs compliance sign-off plus one internal champion; months, not days
expectedFeatures: feasibility answers citing actual system rules
